title: Ghastbusters
description: Bust some ghosts with the Ghastbusters mod!
body:
This mod introduces tools and items from the Ghostbusters universe into Minecraft!

# **New items**

Get ready to bust some ghosts with the **_proton pack_**!

The proton pack locks enemies you shoot at in place and makes them glow if they're invisble! They consume proton charges which are stored in the pack!
_(You need the firing mechanism and the backpack to use it!)_

Search for ghosts using the _P.K.E. scanner!_

This item shows how close you are to nearby invisible entities. A great tool for finding those invisible friends during PVP!

See at night with the new _Etco Goggles_!

This piece of "fashionable" headware lets you see at night! But with the cost of a green overlay. 

## **Look the part!**

Rock the jumpsuits worn by one of the first movie's protagonists or your own!


# **New Rides**

Meet the Etco-1, the iconic car from the first Ghostbusters movie, and it's unfurnished sister the Etco-0. The Etco-1 is equipped with 4 slots for proton packs and their blasters!

# **More Storage!**

Meet your lockers! With slots to store your full getup and some busting equipment these are a must have for any Ghastbuster! They come in three variants; red, gray, and white.

The _Ghost Trap_ works like a shulker box that you can access through your inventory. 9 Extra spots right at your disposal!


# **Get slimed!**

Meet _Etcoplasm_ that strange green goop from the first movie. An extremely viscous fluid that sucks players into it's center!

Is regular etcoplasm too weak for you? Try _Supercharged Etcoplasm_! It flows rapidly and pulls mobs into the center. Players stuck in the goo report severe cases of blindness, nausea, slowness, and the inability to mine blocks.

Or try _Repulsive Etcoplasm_ a type of ectoplasm that pushes mobs away. It spreads really fast, so be careful with it!

# **Just the Beginning**

This mod will be constantly getting updates. So check back reguarly to get new changes.

**Support for full survival mode gameplay coming soon!**
_(Current Status: Partial)_

<summary>Crafting Recipies</summary>
